N4.label: Disruption/Catalyst

big_picture: Austal Limited (ASX: ASB) is initiating coverage at a current price of A$4.81, representing a 45% discount to the 52-week high of A$8.76 and a 25% premium to the 52-week low of A$3.83. The market appears to be pricing in sustained operational difficulty at the company's US Navy shipbuilding operatio
